cases.question: According to Shipshape - Security Audit.pdf, what four attack surfaces must the security probe actively test?

message.content: The four attack surfaces are authentication and session handling, WebSocket message validation, input sanitization, and dependency vulnerabilities [S1].

citations.title: Shipshape - Security Audit.pdf
citations.excerpt: The security probe tool must actively test the live application across at least four attack surfaces: Authentication and session handling, WebSocket message validation, Input sanitization, and Dependency vulnerabilities.
